name: Olowo Jude
title: Pharmacist, Software Developer, Technical Writer

availability.message: Open to health tech roles and collaborations

bio: . I understand healthcare from the inside and build web applications, APIs, and tools that solve real problems for patients and professionals, making complex healthcare systems more usable and efficient.
My background spans clinical pharmacy, software development, and technical writing, giving me a unique ability to design, build, and communicate healthcare solutions that are practical and impactful.

I'm proficient in a wide range of technologies, including Python, Django, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, and JavaScript, enabling me to create structured, scalable systems that power health-focused products.

Alongside development, I leverage technical writing to simplify complex concepts and create clear, actionable content, making me a valuable asset for teams that need both functional solutions and understandable documentation.
What sets me apart is my ability to bridge the gap between healthcare and technology and turn complex clinical workflows into systems people can actually use and understand.
Right now, I'm looking to work with teams solving real problems in healthcare — products that improve how care is delivered, documented, or understood. If that's what you're building, let's connect.
